hero.headline: Your next trip starts with a conversation.
hero.subheadline: Emilia helps you shape your travel ideas into a clear plan — naturally, simply, and beautifully.
promptChips: I want a beach vacation in February
Help me choose between Spain and Portugal
Plan a family trip with kids
I want a romantic trip to Japan

chatPreview.userMessage: I want to go to Italy for about 10 days, but I'm not sure which cities make the most sense.
chatPreview.assistantMessage: That sounds like a beautiful trip. Do you picture it as more cultural, relaxed, food-focused, or a bit of everything? And are you thinking of one region or a multi-city route?

ecosystem.headline: Emilia also powers travel businesses
ecosystem.subheadline: Emilia starts as a conversation for travelers, but its capabilities also extend into the professional side of travel.

agencies.title: Emilia for Agencies
agencies.copy: Power your agency with Emilia and help your team respond faster, structure travel requests better, and sell with less friction.

wholesalers.title: Emilia B2B for Wholesalers
wholesalers.copy: Bring Emilia's magic into your search experience and give your agency network a smarter, more natural way to explore travel options.

howItWorks.headline: Travel planning, shaped through conversation.
howItWorks.subheadline: Start with an idea, refine it naturally, and turn it into a clearer, more useful trip plan.

steps.title: Tell Emilia what kind of trip you want
steps.copy: Share a destination, a feeling, a travel style, or just a rough idea.

steps.title: Refine your plan together
steps.copy: Emilia asks smart follow-up questions to understand what fits you best.

steps.title: Get a clearer travel plan
steps.copy: Turn scattered thoughts into a more structured, personalized trip.

promptDemo.headline: Emilia understands travel the way people actually talk.
promptDemo.subheadline: From vague ideas to more structured plans, Emilia helps you shape your trip naturally.
prompts: I want a beach trip in February but I don't know where to go
Help me plan a romantic trip to Japan
I'm thinking of Spain and Portugal for around two weeks
I want a family trip with kids, warm weather and easy logistics
Plan a first-time trip to Southeast Asia

helpsWith.headline: Less friction. More clarity.
helpsWith.subheadline: Emilia helps you move from "I have an idea" to "I know how this trip could come together."

features.title: Choose better destinations
features.copy: Explore places that fit your timing, style and travel mood.

features.title: Shape your itinerary
features.copy: Organize cities, pacing and trip flow in a way that makes sense.

features.title: Compare travel styles
features.copy: Think through cultural, beach, romantic, family or mixed experiences.

features.title: Make vague ideas useful
features.copy: Turn broad intentions into something more concrete and actionable.

features.title: Simplify planning
features.copy: Reduce mental overload and get to a clearer travel structure faster.

features.title: Think through route logic
features.copy: Combine places and durations in a more natural way.

inspiration.headline: A few ways to start.
inspiration.subheadline: Choose a direction and let Emilia help you shape it.

cards.title: 7 days in Rio
cards.prompt: Plan a 7-day trip to Rio de Janeiro — first-time visitor, interested in culture, beach and food.
cards.alt: Cristo Redentor overlooking Rio de Janeiro at dusk

cards.title: 10 days in Italy
cards.prompt: Plan a 10-day trip through Italy — I'd like a mix of culture and food, open to a multi-city route.
cards.alt: Italian hillside town with vineyards and warm stone architecture

cards.title: Spain + Portugal
cards.prompt: Plan a 2-week trip combining Spain and Portugal — help me choose cities and pacing.
cards.alt: Historic Iberian plaza with tiled walls and warm evening light

cards.title: Family beach escape
cards.prompt: Plan a family beach trip with kids, warm weather and easy logistics. Any continent.
cards.alt: Family walking along a tropical beach lined with palm trees

cards.title: Romantic Europe
cards.prompt: Plan a romantic 10-day trip through Europe — I'd like to include 2 or 3 cities with character.
cards.alt: A couple strolling through a romantic European old town at golden hour

cards.title: Japan for first-timers
cards.prompt: Plan a first-time trip to Japan, around 12 days, balanced between Tokyo, Kyoto and one more region.
cards.alt: Traditional Japanese temple framed by cherry blossoms and paper lanterns

understands.headline: Built for real travel conversations.
understands.subheadline: Emilia can help with different kinds of travel thinking, not just perfectly structured requests.

personalized.headline: Travel plans that feel more like you.
personalized.subheadline: Emilia adapts to your rhythm, style, preferences and constraints, so the trip starts taking shape around the way you want to travel.

points.label: Pace and trip rhythm
points.caption: The speed that actually fits how you like to travel.

points.label: Travel style and mood
points.caption: Cultural, relaxed, food-focused, adventurous or a blend.

points.label: Number of days
points.caption: From short escapes to longer journeys, shaped to your timing.

points.label: Who is traveling
points.caption: Solo, couple, family or friends — with the right considerations.

points.label: Flexibility and constraints
points.caption: Dates, budgets, must-sees or anything you want to avoid.

points.label: Personal preferences
points.caption: The small details that make a trip feel like yours.

trust.headline: Designed by a travel technology company.
trust.subheadline: Emilia is part of Vibook, a company focused on building better travel experiences through intelligent interfaces.

finalCta.headline: Start planning with Emilia.
finalCta.subheadline: Your next trip might begin with a single message.
